query:
UPDATE wa_conversations c
JOIN (
  SELECT m.sessionId, m.remoteJid, m.content, m.messageType, m.fromMe, m.status
  FROM messages m
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT sessionId, remoteJid, MAX(id) as max_id
    FROM messages
    WHERE messageType NOT IN ('protocolMessage', 'reactionMessage', 'senderKeyDistributionMessage', 'messageContextInfo', 'ephemeralMessage')
    AND content IS NOT NULL
    AND content != ''
    GROUP BY sessionId, remoteJid
  ) latest ON m.sessionId = latest.sessionId AND m.remoteJid = latest.remoteJid AND m.id = latest.max_id
) AS real_last ON c.sessionId = real_last.sessionId AND c.remoteJid = real_last.remoteJid
SET 
  c.lastMessagePreview = LEFT(real_last.content, 300),
  c.lastMessageType = real_last.messageType,
  c.lastFromMe = real_last.fromMe,
  c.lastStatus = real_last.status
WHERE c.lastMessageType IN ('protocolMessage', 'reactionMessage');

  ) latest ON m.sessionId = latest.sessionId AND m.remoteJid = latest.remoteJid AND m.id = latest.max_id
